import React, { useState } from 'react'; import Layout from '../components/Layout'; import { Card } from '../components/SharedComponents'; import { Activity, MapPin, AlertTriangle, Filter, Download, Eye } from 'lucide-react'; const ptmData = [ { id: 'PTM-001', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Alpha', location: 'Potline 1, Bay A', status: 'Active', currentPot: 'P-142', health: 87, fillPercentage: 68, temperature: 78, feedRate: 145, operatingHours: 3240, anomalyScore: 12, compressorStatus: 'normal', pumpStatus: 'normal', chuteStatus: 'normal' }, { id: 'PTM-002', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Beta', location: 'Potline 1, Bay B', status: 'Filling', currentPot: 'P-387', health: 92, fillPercentage: 95, temperature: 82, feedRate: 152, operatingHours: 2890, anomalyScore: 8, compressorStatus: 'normal', pumpStatus: 'normal', chuteStatus: 'normal' }, { id: 'PTM-003', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Gamma', location: 'Potline 2, Bay A', status: 'Warning', currentPot: 'P-523', health: 64, fillPercentage: 42, temperature: 95, feedRate: 128, operatingHours: 4120, anomalyScore: 34, compressorStatus: 'warning', pumpStatus: 'normal', chuteStatus: 'warning' }, { id: 'PTM-004', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Delta', location: 'Potline 2, Bay B', status: 'Critical', currentPot: 'P-689', health: 38, fillPercentage: 15, temperature: 102, feedRate: 95, operatingHours: 5340, anomalyScore: 67, compressorStatus: 'critical', pumpStatus: 'warning', chuteStatus: 'critical' }, { id: 'PTM-005', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Epsilon', location: 'Potline 3, Bay A', status: 'Active', currentPot: 'P-801', health: 89, fillPercentage: 73, temperature: 75, feedRate: 148, operatingHours: 2650, anomalyScore: 10, compressorStatus: 'normal', pumpStatus: 'normal', chuteStatus: 'normal' }, { id: 'PTM-006', name: 'Pot Tending Machine Zeta', location: 'Potline 3, Bay B', status: 'Maintenance', currentPot: 'N/A', health: 72, fillPercentage: 0, temperature: 65, feedRate: 0, operatingHours: 3890, anomalyScore: 0, compressorStatus: 'offline', pumpStatus: 'offline', chuteStatus: 'offline' }, ]; const getStatusColor = (status) => { const colors = { 'Active': 'bg-green-500/10 text-green-400', 'Filling': 'bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400', 'Warning': 'bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-400', 'Critical': 'bg-red-500/10 text-red-400', 'Maintenance': 'bg-slate-500/10 text-slate-400' }; return colors[status] || 'bg-slate-500/10 text-slate-400'; }; export default function PTMMonitoring() { const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState('all'); const stats = { total: ptmData.length, active: ptmData.filter(p => p.status === 'Active' || p.status === 'Filling').length, warning: ptmData.filter(p => p.status === 'Warning').length, critical: ptmData.filter(p => p.status === 'Critical').length, avgHealth: Math.round(ptmData.reduce((acc, p) => acc + p.health, 0) / ptmData.length), }; const openInMaps = (lat, lng, name) => { const url = `https://www.google.com/maps?q=20.8550,85.2084`; // NALCO Angul coordinates window.open(url, '_blank'); }; const filteredData = filterStatus === 'all' ? ptmData : ptmData.filter(ptm => ptm.status === filterStatus); return (
{/* Header */}

PTM Monitoring

Real-time tracking of 39 Pot Tending Machines across 960 pots

{/* Stats */}

Total PTMs

{stats.total}

Active/Filling

{stats.active}

Warnings

{stats.warning}

Critical

{stats.critical}

Avg Health

{stats.avgHealth}%
{/* Reports Table */} {filteredData.map((ptm) => ( ))}
PTM ID Name Location Status Current Pot Health Fill % Actions
{ptm.id}

{ptm.name}

{ptm.operatingHours.toLocaleString()}h
openInMaps()}> {ptm.location}
{ptm.status} {ptm.currentPot}
= 80 ? 'bg-green-500' : ptm.health >= 60 ? 'bg-orange-500' : 'bg-red-500' }`} style={{ width: `${ptm.health}%` }} />
= 80 ? 'text-green-400' : ptm.health >= 60 ? 'text-orange-400' : 'text-red-400' }`}> {ptm.health}%
{ptm.fillPercentage}%
); }
